data.title: RED test: Create behavioral tests for follow-on epic scrutiny gate
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create `tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh` with 5 behavioral tests verifying brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 0 contains required follow-on scrutiny logic.

**Test rationale**: SKILL.md is a non-executable instruction document; its text content constitutes the behavioral contract for agents. Source-grepping is the established testing pattern for SKILL.md files in this codebase (see tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh and 6 siblings). The test quality gate's bash-grep detector does not flag .md file grepping.

**Tests**:
- test_followon_gate_invokes_scrutiny_pipeline: Verify Step 0 references invoking the scrutiny pipeline for each follow-on epic
- test_followon_gate_depth_cap: Verify depth cap logic exists (follow_on_depth >= 1 triggers stub)
- test_followon_gate_request_origin_part_a_skip: Verify scope-split handling with Part A content pre-strip
- test_followon_gate_exposes_depth_variable: Verify follow_on_depth exposed as named state variable
- test_followon_gate_stub_presentation: Verify stub presentation format for depth >= 1 follow-ons

**TDD**: All 5 tests FAIL against current brainstorm SKILL.md (lines 419-441 have no scrutiny invocation, depth cap, or request_origin handling).

### Files to modify
- tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add mapping with [test-follow-on-scrutiny] RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED marker [test-follow-on-scrutiny] in .test-index tolerates expected failures
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh && test -x tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Test file includes comment block explaining why source-grepping is used for SKILL.md (references precedent)
  Verify: grep -q "instruction document\|behavioral contract\|established.*pattern\|precedent" tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh
- [ ] All 5 tests fail against current brainstorm SKILL.md (RED state)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] .test-index entry maps plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md to tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md.*tests/skills/test-follow-on-scrutiny.sh' .test-index
